NativeMarkdownNamespaces.description: Namespaces (IDs) in which new pages default to the markdown content model.

NativeMarkdownEverywhere.description: If new pages should default to the markdown content model everywhere, except discussion, Template and MediaWiki namespaces and namespaces with an explicitly configured content model.

NativeMarkdownSuffixDetection.description: If new pages with a title ending in .md should default to the markdown content model.

NativeMarkdownAllowExternalImages.description: If external images in markdown should be embedded. When false (default), they are rendered as plain links.

NativeMarkdownWikitextExpansion.description: If MediaWiki {{...}} syntax on markdown pages is expanded by the wikitext parser (default). Enables templates, parser functions, magic words, and (with Scribunto) Lua modules. When false, {{...}} is left as literal text.
